jobs.title: Analyst, FP&A
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: VF Corporation is looking for an exceptional FP&A Analyst , Shared Functions to join our Finance team based in Stabio, Switzerland. Let’s talk about the role! As FP&A Analyst, will support brand FP&A activities related to P&L Planning and Forecasting focusing on Sales & Margin of Wholesale channel, playing a key role to create alignment around Gross-To-Net, analysing the main channel and accounts dynamics and performances as well as supporting the brand to make the right decisions to maximize marginality. You will gather information on forecast & plan data, which has to be loaded in the reporting tool (BPC) and deliver reports, as determined by area leads and Senior Management. To achieve the goals of the department you will work closely together with your colleagues of the Finance department as well as other functions such as DTC, Planning, Sales and report directly to the Director, FP&A. We expect that you will deliver unbeatable results whilst fulfilling the following aspects of the FP&A Analyst role: - Manage and handle Financial GTN planning and Forecasting tools and ensure consistency and accuracy of figures submitted in the systems; - Ensure that actuals are aligned to expectations and proactively analyse and report variances vs forecast with - Keep continuous alignment between financial & commercial GTN to ensure alignment/balance between Sales, Margin and inventory targets; - Deliver forecasting accuracy excellence and pro-actively analyze any critical trends or dynamics within the channels and the main accounts; - Ensure that all recurring requests related to forecast and plan are delivered accurately and on time: store roll, key accounts details, revenue walk, margin bridge, category overviews, etc.; - Support the 5YR rolling financial plan (LRP) partnering with the global strategy, global merch planning & Ops and Product. Understand the brand strategy and support in drawing conclusions through financial analysis; - Assist in ad-hoc analysis on request of European or Global/Corporate management Skills for Success You will be a professional with proven experience in business controlling and financial planning, with a strong analytical mindset and: - Minimum bachelor’s degree in finance area (accounting, controlling) and 1/2 years of related work experience preferrable; - Solid software and PC skills (Advanced in Excel, PowerPoint, SAP/COGNOS, BPC experience is a plus) - Great time management and prioritizing skills with the ability to meet strict deadlines - Strong English command (written and verbal) - Proven communication skills in interacting with people from a non-financial background - Excellent organizational skills & goal-oriented About VF VF is a global apparel company connecting people to the lifestyles they cherish through our family of iconic brands. At the heart of our journey lies our purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. This is our purpose. It’s the reason we come to work every day. Our purpose unites us and leads us to pursue our goals, together. This is our calling. Learn more at vfc.com What’s in it For You We’re in the business of unleashing human potential, driven by the ideas, energy and commitment of our people. That’s why we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical and financial well-being for all VF associates. When it comes to benefits, we’re the total package. - A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do - An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together - Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - A discount card with 50% on all VF brands - Break out areas offering complimentary hot drinks Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. R-20260323-0032

titleByLocale.it: Analista, FP&A
titleByLocale.fr: Analyste, FP&A

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione VF Corporation sta cercando un eccezionale analista FP&A , Shared Functions per unirsi al nostro team di finanza con sede a Stabio, Svizzera. Parliamo del ruolo! Come analista FP&A, supporterà le attività di FP&A del marchio relative alla pianificazione e previsione del P&L concentrandosi sulle vendite e sul margine del canale Wholesale, giocando un ruolo chiave nella creazione di allineamento intorno al Gross-To-Net, analizzando le dinamiche e le prestazioni dei principali canali e conti nonché supportando il marchio per prendere le giuste decisioni per massimizzare la marginalità. Raccoglierà informazioni sui dati di previsione e pianificazione, che devono essere caricati nel tool di reporting (BPC) e consegnare rapporti, come determinato dai responsabili dell'area e dal Senior Management. Per raggiungere gli obiettivi del reparto, lavorerà a stretto contatto con i colleghi del reparto Finanza nonché con altre funzioni come DTC, Pianificazione, Vendite e riferirà direttamente al Direttore, FP&A. Ci aspettiamo che consegni risultati eccezionali mentre adempie ai seguenti aspetti del ruolo di analista FP&A: ## Mansioni - Gestire e gestire gli strumenti di pianificazione e previsione finanziaria GTN e garantire la coerenza e l'accuratezza delle cifre inserite nei sistemi; - Garantire che i dati effettivi siano allineati alle aspettative e analizzare e segnalare proattivamente le variazioni rispetto alla previsione con - Mantenere un allineamento continuo tra finanziario e commerciale GTN per garantire l'allineamento / equilibrio tra vendite, margine e obiettivi di inventario; - Consegnare l'eccellenza dell'accuratezza delle previsioni e analizzare proattivamente le tendenze o dinamiche critiche all'interno dei canali e dei conti principali; - Garantire che tutte le richieste ricorrenti relative a previsioni e piani siano consegnate in modo accurato e in tempo: roll store, dettagli conti chiave, passeggiata entrate, ponte margine, panoramica categoria, ecc.; - Supportare il piano finanziario a 5 anni (LRP) che lavora con la strategia globale, la pianificazione globale della merce e le operazioni e il prodotto. Comprendere la strategia del marchio e supportare nel trarre conclusioni attraverso l'analisi finanziaria; - Assistere nell'analisi ad hoc su richiesta della gestione europea o globale / aziendale ## 
• Requisiti - Laurea minima in area finanziaria (contabilità, controllo) e 1/2 anni di esperienza lavorativa correlata preferibile; - Solid skills software e PC (avanzato in Excel, PowerPoint, SAP / COGNOS, esperienza BPC è un plus) - Ottime capacità di gestione del tempo e di priorità con la capacità di rispettare scadenze rigorose - Forte comando inglese (scritto e verbale) - Competenze di comunicazione comprovate nell'interagire con persone di un background non finanziario - Eccellenti capacità organizzative e orientate agli obiettivi ## 
• Cosa offriamo - Una cultura basata su feedback di supporto in cui il rispetto e l'integrità ci guidano in ciò che facciamo - Un ambiente internazionale inclusivo in cui le persone di diversi background, stili di vita e nazionalità amano lavorare insieme - Essere parte di un marchio di lifestyle iconico in un'organizzazione multi-marca e multi-paese - Palestra in loco che offre iniziative di salute e benessere - Una carta sconto con il 50% su tutti i marchi VF - Aree di ritrovo che offrono bevande calde gratuite ## Contatto R-20260323-0032
descriptionByLocale.en: VF Corporation is looking for an exceptional FP&A Analyst , Shared Functions to join our Finance team based in Stabio, Switzerland. Let’s talk about the role! As FP&A Analyst, will support brand FP&A activities related to P&L Planning and Forecasting focusing on Sales & Margin of Wholesale channel, playing a key role to create alignment around Gross-To-Net, analysing the main channel and accounts dynamics and performances as well as supporting the brand to make the right decisions to maximize marginality. You will gather information on forecast & plan data, which has to be loaded in the reporting tool (BPC) and deliver reports, as determined by area leads and Senior Management. To achieve the goals of the department you will work closely together with your colleagues of the Finance department as well as other functions such as DTC, Planning, Sales and report directly to the Director, FP&A. We expect that you will deliver unbeatable results whilst fulfilling the following aspects of the FP&A Analyst role: - Manage and handle Financial GTN planning and Forecasting tools and ensure consistency and accuracy of figures submitted in the systems; - Ensure that actuals are aligned to expectations and proactively analyse and report variances vs forecast with - Keep continuous alignment between financial & commercial GTN to ensure alignment/balance between Sales, Margin and inventory targets; - Deliver forecasting accuracy excellence and pro-actively analyze any critical trends or dynamics within the channels and the main accounts; - Ensure that all recurring requests related to forecast and plan are delivered accurately and on time: store roll, key accounts details, revenue walk, margin bridge, category overviews, etc.; - Support the 5YR rolling financial plan (LRP) partnering with the global strategy, global merch planning & Ops and Product. Understand the brand strategy and support in drawing conclusions through financial analysis; - Assist in ad-hoc analysis on request of European or Global/Corporate management Skills for Success You will be a professional with proven experience in business controlling and financial planning, with a strong analytical mindset and: - Minimum bachelor’s degree in finance area (accounting, controlling) and 1/2 years of related work experience preferrable; - Solid software and PC skills (Advanced in Excel, PowerPoint, SAP/COGNOS, BPC experience is a plus) - Great time management and prioritizing skills with the ability to meet strict deadlines - Strong English command (written and verbal) - Proven communication skills in interacting with people from a non-financial background - Excellent organizational skills & goal-oriented About VF VF is a global apparel company connecting people to the lifestyles they cherish through our family of iconic brands. At the heart of our journey lies our purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. This is our purpose. It’s the reason we come to work every day. Our purpose unites us and leads us to pursue our goals, together. This is our calling. Learn more at vfc.com What’s in it For You We’re in the business of unleashing human potential, driven by the ideas, energy and commitment of our people. That’s why we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical and financial well-being for all VF associates. When it comes to benefits, we’re the total package. - A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do - An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together - Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - A discount card with 50% on all VF brands - Break out areas offering complimentary hot drinks Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. R-20260323-0032
descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung VF Corporation sucht einen außergewöhnlichen FP&A-Analysten , Shared Functions, um unser Finanzielles Team mit Sitz in Stabio, Schweiz, zu unterstützen. Lass uns über die Rolle sprechen! Als FP&A-Analyst werden Sie die FP&A-Aktivitäten des Markenbereichs in Bezug auf P&L-Planung und -Prognose unterstützen, wobei der Schwerpunkt auf den Verkäufen und der Marge des Großhandelskanals liegt. Sie spielen eine Schlüsselrolle bei der Schaffung von Übereinstimmung um Gross-To-Net, analysieren die Dynamik und Leistung der wichtigsten Kanäle und Konten sowie unterstützen die Marke bei der richtigen Entscheidungsfindung, um die Marginalität zu maximieren. Sie werden Informationen über Prognose- und Planungsdaten sammeln, die in das Berichtstool (BPC) geladen werden müssen, und Berichte liefern, wie von den Bereichsleitern und dem Senior Management festgelegt. Um die Ziele der Abteilung zu erreichen, werden Sie eng mit Ihren Kollegen der Finanzabteilung sowie mit anderen Funktionen wie DTC, Planung, Vertrieb zusammenarbeiten und direkt an den Direktor, FP&A, berichten. Wir erwarten, dass Sie außergewöhnliche Ergebnisse liefern und dabei die folgenden Aspekte der FP&A-Analystenrolle erfüllen: ## 
• Aufgaben - Verwaltung und Handhabung von Financial GTN-Planungs- und Prognose-Tools und Sicherstellung der Konsistenz und Genauigkeit der in den Systemen eingereichten Zahlen; - Sicherstellen, dass die Ist-Werte mit den Erwartungen übereinstimmen und proaktiv analysieren und berichten über Abweichungen gegenüber der Prognose mit - Kontinuierliche Übereinstimmung zwischen finanziell und kommerziell GTN, um die Übereinstimmung / Balance zwischen Umsatz, Marge und Lagerzielen sicherzustellen; - Lieferung von Prognose-Genauigkeitsexzellenz und proaktive Analyse von kritischen Trends oder Dynamiken innerhalb der Kanäle und Haupt Konten; - Sicherstellen, dass alle wiederkehrenden 
• Anforderungen in Bezug auf Prognose und Planung genau und rechtzeitig geliefert werden: Store-Rollen, wichtige Kontodetails, Umsatzspaziergang, Marge-Brücke, Kategorieübersichten usw.; - Unterstützung des 5-jährigen rollierenden Finanzplans (LRP) in Partnerschaft mit der globalen Strategie, der globalen Merch-Planning & Ops und dem Produkt. Verstehen der Markenstrategie und Unterstützung bei der Ziehung von Schlussfolgerungen durch Finanzanalyse; - Unterstützung bei Ad-hoc-Analysen auf Anfrage der europäischen oder globalen / Unternehmensleitung ## 
• Anforderungen - Mindestens Bachelor-Abschluss in Finanzbereich (Rechnungswesen, Controlling) und 1/2 Jahre relevante Berufserfahrung; - Solide Software- und PC-Kenntnisse (fortgeschritten in Excel, PowerPoint, SAP / COGNOS, BPC-Erfahrung ist ein Plus) - Gute Zeitmanagement- und Prioritätsfähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, strikte Fristen einzuhalten - Starke Englischkenntnisse (schriftlich und mündlich) - Nachweisbare Kommunikationsfähigkeiten bei der Interaktion mit Personen aus einem nichtfinanziellen Hintergrund - Hervorragende organisatorische Fähigkeiten und zielorientiert ## Was bieten wir - Eine unterstützende Feedback-basierte Kultur, in der Respekt und Integrität uns bei unserer Arbeit leiten - Eine inklusive internationale Umgebung, in der Menschen mit unterschiedlichem Hintergrund, Lebensstil und Nationalität gerne zusammenarbeiten - Teil eines ikonischen Lifestyle-Markenunternehmens in einer Multi-Marken-, Multi-Länder-Organisation - Vor-Ort-Fitnessstudio mit Gesundheits- und Wellness-Initiativen - Eine Rabattkarte mit 50% auf alle VF-Marken - Pausenbereiche mit kostenlosen heißen Getränken ## Kontakt R-20260323-0032
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Description VF Corporation recherche un analyste FP&A exceptionnel , Shared Functions pour rejoindre notre équipe de finance basée à Stabio, Suisse. Parlons du rôle ! En tant qu'analyste FP&A, vous soutiendrez les activités FP&A de la marque liées à la planification et aux prévisions de P&L en mettant l'accent sur les ventes et la marge du canal de gros, jouant un rôle clé pour créer un alignement autour de Gross-To-Net, en analysant les dynamiques et les performances des principaux canaux et comptes ainsi qu'en aidant la marque à prendre les bonnes décisions pour maximiser la marginalité. Vous collecterez des informations sur les données de prévision et de planification qui doivent être chargées dans l'outil de reporting (BPC) et livrerez des rapports, comme déterminé par les responsables de la zone et la direction supérieure. Pour atteindre les objectifs du département, vous travaillerez en étroite collaboration avec vos collègues du département financier ainsi qu'avec d'autres fonctions telles que DTC, Planification, Ventes et rendrez compte directement au directeur, FP&A. Nous attendons de vous que vous livriez des résultats exceptionnels tout en remplissant les aspects suivants du rôle d'analyste FP&A : ## Tâches - Gérer et gérer les outils de planification et de prévision financière GTN et garantir la cohérence et l'exactitude des chiffres soumis dans les systèmes; - Assurer que les données réelles sont alignées sur les attentes et analyser et signaler de manière proactive les écarts par rapport à la prévision avec - Maintenir un alignement continu entre les aspects financiers et commerciaux GTN pour garantir l'alignement / l'équilibre entre les ventes, la marge et les objectifs de stock; - Livrer une excellence en matière de précision des prévisions et analyser de manière proactive les tendances ou dynamiques critiques au sein des canaux et des principaux comptes; - Assurer que toutes les demandes récurrentes liées aux prévisions et aux plans sont livrées avec précision et à temps: roulement des magasins, détails des comptes clés, promenade des revenus, pont de marge, vues d'ensemble de la catégorie, etc.; - Soutenir le plan financier à 5 ans (LRP) en partenariat avec la stratégie mondiale, la planification mondiale de la marchandise et les opérations et le produit. Comprendre la stratégie de la marque et soutenir la prise de conclusions grâce à l'analyse financière; - Assister à l'analyse ad hoc à la demande de la direction européenne ou mondiale / des entreprises ## 
• Exigences - Diplôme minimum de licence en domaine financier (comptabilité, contrôle) et 1/2 an d'expérience professionnelle connexe; - Compétences solides en logiciel et en PC (avancées en Excel, PowerPoint, SAP / COGNOS, expérience BPC est un plus) - Excellentes compétences en gestion du temps et en priorisation avec la capacité de respecter des délais stricts - Commande forte de l'anglais (écrit et oral) - Compétences de communication prouvées pour interagir avec des personnes d'un contexte non financier - Compétences organisationnelles exceptionnelles et orientées vers les objectifs ## Ce que nous offrons - Une culture basée sur un feedback de soutien où le respect et l'intégrité nous guident dans ce que nous faisons - Un environnement international inclusif où les personnes de divers horizons, de styles de vie et de nationalités aiment travailler ensemble - Faire partie d'une marque de lifestyle iconique dans une organisation multi-marques et multi-pays - Salle de sport sur place offrant des initiatives de santé et de bien-être - Une carte de réduction avec 50% sur toutes les marques VF - Aires de repos offrant des boissons chaudes gratuites ## Contact R-20260323-0032

jobs.title: Allocator Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description:
## Descrizione
Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Allocator Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com .

## Key information
- Start date: June 1st, 2026
- Duration: 12 months , full-time
- Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF
- Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland
- Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case)

## Eligibility requirements
- You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026
- You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship

## Mansioni
Let’s talk about the role! We are looking for a Allocator intern to join VANS within VF EMEA Internship Program. In this role, you will provide support to the Allocation Team:
- By taking an active role in analysing performance and sales trend.
- Monitoring deliveries, maintaining adequate stock levels.
- Taking care of replenishment / initial allocation for O&O EMEA Stores.
- Developing and maintaining reports and tools finding the best way to make them efficient and useful for the team.

## Requisiti
How you will make a difference You should be an analytical, resilient and curious team player, being:
- Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills.
- Passionate for numbers with strong analytical skills: accuracy and attention to details is a must.
- Proficient in Microsoft Excel.
- Knowledge of any BI platform will be considered as a plus (eg: Power BI).
- Eager to learn and face up new challenges.
- Proactive in order to achieve yours and your team goals.
- First experiences such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered as a plus

## Cosa offriamo
What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below:
- Learn about Vans’ trends and main logics of Retail Merchandising.
- Learn logics of inventory management, sales analysis, and allocation strategies.
- Learn to work with a wide team of internal stakeholder.

The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including:
- Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project
- One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands
- Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership

We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period.

Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy:
- Hybrid working policy
- 50% discount on VF brands
- On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives
- Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks
- Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location
- A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together.

Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day.

## Contatto
Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione Sii un sognatore, fai la differenza! Unisciti al #VFInternshipProgram nella nostra sede EMEA a Stabio, Svizzera come Tirocinante Allocatore per Vans. VF sta ridefinendo cosa significa essere la migliore azienda di abbigliamento, calzature e attrezzature al mondo, potenziando marchi iconici di stile di vita attivo tra cui The North Face®, Vans® e Timberland®. Scopri di più su http://vfc.com . ## Informazioni chiave - Data di inizio: 1 giugno 2026 - Durata: 12 mesi, full-time - Salario lordo mensile: 1’850 CHF - Luogo: Sede EMEA di VF a Stabio, Svizzera - Processo di reclutamento semplificato: 3 colloqui (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potenziale Business Case) ## 
• Requisiti di idoneità - Devi laurearti dopo il 1 maggio 2026 O devi avere lo status di studente a partire da giugno 2026 - Devi possedere la cittadinanza UE o EEA (European Economic Area) ## Mansioni Parliamo del ruolo! 
• Cerchiamo un tirocinante Allocatore da inserire in VANS all'interno del Programma di Stage EMEA di VF. In questo ruolo, fornirai supporto al Team di Allocazione: - Partecipando attivamente all'analisi delle prestazioni e delle tendenze di vendita. - Monitorando le consegne, mantenendo livelli di stock adeguati. - Curando il riassortimento / allocazione iniziale per i negozi O&O EMEA. - Sviluppando e mantenendo report e strumenti trovando il modo migliore per renderli efficienti e utili per il team. ## 
• Requisiti Come farai la differenza Devi essere un giocatore di squadra analitico, resiliente e curioso, essendo: - Fluente in inglese con eccellenti capacità di comunicazione verbale e scritta. - Appassionato di numeri con forti capacità analitiche: precisione e attenzione ai dettagli sono indispensabili. - Competente in Microsoft Excel. - La conoscenza di qualsiasi piattaforma BI sarà considerata un plus (es: Power BI). - Desideroso di imparare e affrontare nuove sfide. - Proattivo per raggiungere i tuoi e i tuoi obiettivi di squadra. - Prime esperienze come altri stage, attività extracurriculari, sono considerate un plus ## 
• Cosa offriamo Cosa c'è per te Alla fine del periodo di stage, puoi aspettarti di avere una chiara comprensione di quanto segue: - Imparare le tendenze di Vans e le logiche principali del Retail Merchandising. - Imparare le logiche della gestione dell'inventario, analisi delle vendite e strategie di allocazione. - Imparare a lavorare con un ampio team di stakeholder interni. Il Programma di Stage EMEA di VF è un viaggio di 12 mesi progettato per sviluppare e potenziare i talenti emergenti all'inizio delle loro carriere. Siamo impegnati a liberare il tuo potenziale, quindi puoi aspettarti un percorso di apprendimento strutturato e un'esperienza pratica ricca, inclusi: - Workshop dedicati allo sviluppo delle competenze e progetto di gruppo di consulenza interna - Un giorno di lavoro in negozio per ottenere reali approfondimenti sui nostri marchi - Opportunità di networking con colleghi e leadership senior Non possiamo garantire che lo stage ti porterà a un contratto successivo, ma grazie al valore dell'esperienza la maggior parte dei nostri stagisti rimane nella società dopo il periodo di stage. Poiché vogliamo che tu ti concentri su ciò che conta, offriamo benefici completi che incoraggiano il benessere mentale, fisico e finanziario. Potrai godere di: - Politica di lavoro ibrido - 50% di sconto sui marchi VF - Palestra in loco, offrendo iniziative per la salute e il benessere - Mensa sovvenzionata, oltre a zone di pausa con bevande gratuite - Autobus navetta per l'ufficio o sconto sui trasporti pubblici, a seconda della tua posizione - Una comunità di stagisti fiorente, con persone di background, stili di vita e nazionalità diversi che amano lavorare insieme. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging Come datore di lavoro con pari opportunità, ci impegniamo a promuovere una cultura di appartenenza basata sul rispetto, sulla connessione, sull'apertura e sull'autenticità. Siamo impegnati a costruire e mantenere un luogo di lavoro che celebra la diversità dei nostri collaboratori, permettendo loro di portare la loro autenticità al lavoro ogni giorno. ## Contatto Se sei interessato?
descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung Sei ein Träumer, mach den Unterschied! Schließe dich dem #VFInternshipProgram in unserem EMEA-HQ in Stabio, Schweiz als Allocator-Praktikant für Vans an. VF definiert neu, was es bedeutet, das weltweit beste Bekleidungs-, Schuh- und Ausrüstungsunternehmen zu sein, und unterstützt ikonische aktive Lifestyle-Marken wie The North Face®, Vans® und Timberland®. Erfahre mehr unter http://vfc.com . ## Schlüsselinfos - Startdatum: 1. Juni 2026 - Dauer: 12 Monate, Vollzeit - Bruttomonatsgehalt: 1’850 CHF - Standort: VF EMEA Hauptquartier in Stabio, Schweiz - Vereinfachter Rekrutierungsprozess: 3 Interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potenzielles Business Case) ## Zulassungsvoraussetzungen - Du musst nach dem 1. Mai 2026 promovieren O du musst zum Juni 2026 einen Studentenstatus haben - Du musst EU- oder EEA-Staatsangehörigkeit besitzen ## 
• Aufgaben Lass uns über die Rolle sprechen! Wir suchen einen Allocator-Praktikanten, der VANS im Rahmen des VF EMEA Internship Program einbindet. In dieser Rolle wirst du dem Allocation Team Unterstützung bieten: - Durch aktive Analyse von Performance und Verkaufstrends. - Durch Überwachung von Lieferungen, Aufrechterhaltung angemessener Lagerbestände. - Durch Pflege der Nachschub/erste Allocation für O&O EMEA Stores. - Durch Entwicklung und Pflege von Reports und Tools, um die effizienteste und nützlichste Lösung für das Team zu finden. ## 
• Anforderungen Wie du einen Unterschied machst Du solltest ein analytischer, belastbarer und neugieriger Teamplayer sein, indem du: - Fließend Englisch mit exzellenten mündlichen und schriftlichen Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. - Leidenschaft für Zahlen mit starken analytischen Fähigkeiten: Genauigkeit und Detailgenauigkeit sind ein Muss. - Versiert in Microsoft Excel. - Kenntnisse einer BI-Plattform werden als Plus gewertet (z. B.: Power BI). - Neugierig zu lernen und neue Herausforderungen anzunehmen. - Proaktiv, um deine und die Teamziele zu erreichen. - Erste Erfahrungen wie andere Praktika, außerschulische Aktivitäten werden als Plus gewertet. ## 
• Was wir bieten Was gibt es für dich Am Ende des Praktikums kannst du erwarten, ein klares Verständnis von folgendem zu haben: - Lernen über die Trends von Vans und die Hauptlogik des Retail Merchandising. - Lernen über die Logik des Bestandsmanagements, Verkaufsanalyse und Allokationsstrategien. - Lernen, mit einem breiten Team interner Stakeholder zu arbeiten. Das VF EMEA Internship Program ist eine 12‑monatige Reise, die darauf ausgelegt ist, aufstrebende Talente zu entwickeln und zu stärken. Wir setzen uns dafür ein, dein Potenzial freizusetzen, sodass du einen strukturierten Lernweg und reichhaltige praktische Erfahrungen erwarten kannst, einschließlich: - Dedizierte Workshops zur Kompetenzentwicklung & internes Consulting-Projekt - Einen Tag Arbeit im Laden, um echte Einblicke in unsere Marken zu gewinnen - Netzwerkgelegenheiten mit Kollegen und Führungskräften Wir können nicht garantieren, dass das Praktikum zu einem Vertrag danach führt, aber dank des Wertes der Erfahrung bleiben die meisten unserer Praktikanten nach dem Praktikumszeitraum im Unternehmen. Da wir möchten, dass du dich auf das Wesentliche konzentrierst, bieten wir umfassende Leistungen, die geistiges, körperliches und finanzielles Wohlbefinden fördern. Du wirst genießen: - Hybridarbeitsregelung - 50 % Rabatt auf VF-Marken - On‑Site‑Fitnessstudio, das Gesundheits- und Wellnessinitiativen anbietet - Subventionierte Kantine sowie Pausenbereiche mit kostenlosen Getränken - Shuttlebus zum Büro oder Rabatt auf öffentliche Verkehrsmittel, je nach Standort - Eine florierende Community von Praktikanten, mit Menschen unterschiedlicher Hintergründe, Lebensstile und Nationalitäten, die gerne zusammenarbeiten. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging Als Arbeitgeber mit Chancengleichheit streben wir danach, eine Kultur des Zugehörigkeitsgefühls zu fördern, die auf Respekt, Verbindung, Offenheit und Authentizität basiert. Wir setzen uns dafür ein, einen Arbeitsplatz zu schaffen und zu erhalten, der die Vielfalt unserer Mitarbeiter feiert und ihnen ermöglicht, jeden Tag ihre authentische Persönlichkeit einzubringen. ## Kontakt Bist du dabei? Bewirb dich jetzt – frühzeitige Bewerbung erhöht deine Chancen! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Description Soyez un rêveur, faites la différence ! Rejoignez le #VFInternshipProgram dans notre siège EMEA à Stabio, Suisse, en tant que Stagiaire Alloueur pour Vans. VF redéfinit ce que signifie être la meilleure entreprise mondiale de vêtements, chaussures et équipements, en soutenant des marques de style de vie actif emblématiques telles que The North Face®, Vans® et Timberland®. En savoir plus sur http://vfc.com . ## Informations clés - Date de début : 1 juin 2026 - Durée : 12 mois, temps plein - Salaire brut mensuel : 1 850 CHF - Lieu : Siège EMEA de VF à Stabio, Suisse - Processus de recrutement simplifié : 3 entretiens (Recruteur, Responsable du recrutement, cas d’affaires potentiel) ## Conditions d’éligibilité - Vous devez obtenir votre diplôme après le 1 mai 2026 OU vous devez avoir le statut d’étudiant à partir de juin 2026 - Vous devez être citoyen de l’UE ou de l’EEE (Espace économique européen) ## Missions Parlons du rôle ! Nous recherchons un stagiaire Alloueur pour rejoindre VANS dans le cadre du Programme de Stage EMEA de VF. Dans ce rôle, vous apporterez votre soutien à l’équipe d’allocation : - En prenant un rôle actif dans l’analyse des performances et des tendances de vente. - En surveillant les livraisons, en maintenant des niveaux de stock adéquats. - En prenant soin du réapprovisionnement / allocation initiale pour les magasins O&O EMEA. - En développant et en maintenant des rapports et des outils, en trouvant la meilleure façon de les rendre efficaces et utiles pour l’équipe. ## 
• Exigences Comment vous ferez la différence Vous devez être un joueur d’équipe analytique, résilient et curieux, étant : - Fluide en anglais avec d’excellentes compétences en communication verbale et écrite. - Passionné par les chiffres avec de fortes compétences analytiques : précision et attention aux détails sont indispensables. - Maîtrise de Microsoft Excel. - La connaissance d’une plateforme BI sera considérée comme un plus (ex : Power BI). - Désireux d’apprendre et de relever de nouveaux défis. - Proactif afin d’atteindre vos objectifs et ceux de votre équipe. - Les premières expériences telles que d’autres stages, activités extrascolaires, sont considérées comme un plus ## Ce que nous offrons Qu’est‑ce qu’il y a pour vous À la fin de la période de stage, vous pouvez vous attendre à avoir une compréhension claire de ce qui suit : - Apprendre les tendances de Vans et les logiques principales du Retail Merchandising. - Apprendre les logiques de gestion des stocks, d’analyse des ventes et des stratégies d’allocation. - Apprendre à travailler avec une large équipe de parties prenantes internes. Le Programme de Stage EMEA de VF est un parcours de 12 mois conçu pour développer et autonomiser les talents émergents au début de leur carrière. Nous nous engageons à libérer votre potentiel, vous pouvez donc vous attendre à un parcours d’apprentissage structuré et à une expérience pratique riche, incluant : - Ateliers dédiés au développement des compétences & projet de groupe de conseil interne - Un jour de travail en magasin pour obtenir des aperçus réels sur nos marques - Opportunités de réseautage avec des pairs et des dirigeants seniors Nous ne pouvons pas garantir que le stage vous conduira à un contrat par la suite, mais grâce à la valeur de l’expérience, la plupart de nos stagiaires restent dans l’entreprise après la période de stage. Comme nous voulons que vous vous concentriez sur l’essentiel, nous offrons des avantages complets qui encouragent le bien‑être mental, physique et financier. Vous profiterez de : - Politique de travail hybride - 50 % de remise sur les marques VF - Gym sur place, offrant des initiatives de santé et de bien‑être - Cantine subventionnée, ainsi que des espaces de pause proposant des boissons gratuites - Navette vers le bureau ou remise sur les transports publics, selon votre localisation - Une communauté d’étudiants en stage florissante, avec des personnes de divers horizons, styles de vie et nationalités qui aiment travailler ensemble. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging En tant qu’employeur offrant l’égalité des chances, nous nous efforçons de favoriser une culture d’appartenance fondée sur le respect, la connexion, l’ouverture et l’authenticité. Nous nous engageons à construire et à maintenir un lieu de travail qui célèbre la diversité de nos collaborateurs, leur permettant d’apporter leur authenticité au travail chaque jour. ## Contact Vous êtes partant ? Postulez maintenant – une candidature anticipée augmente vos chances ! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007

jobs.title: Retail Marketing Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Retail Marketing Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! This internship offers hands-on experiences at the intersection of marketing and retail, where you’ll help shape in-store activations while learning how brand strategy comes to life at the point of sale Support the planning and execution of retail marketing initiatives that enhance in-store visibility, customer engagement, and sales performance. Gain experience analyzing results, coordinating with cross-functional teams, and translating brand strategy into impactful retail activations. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Retail Marketing intern: - Support the planning and execution of retail marketing and in-store activations, helping bring Vans’ brand, culture, and stories to life in stores. - Coordinate with cross-functional teams (Retail, Creative, Visual Merchandising, and other Marketing functions) to gather all tactics needed to deliver engaging in-store events and consumer activations. - Assist with retail marketing operations across EMEA, supporting different store formats (Owned, Partner, Outlet). - Contribute to training and communication materials for store teams ahead of key activations or events. - Help execute retail campaigns and store activations, including in-store visuals, digital retail communications, and event-related materials. - Provide day-to-day support on cross-functional needs, such as copy coordination, translations, and event logistics. - Work closely with DTC (Direct To Consumer) Retail teams (district and store managers) to support smooth execution at store level. - Support the creation of briefs and post-activation recaps, capturing learnings and best practices for future in-store initiatives. - Support basic budget tracking and purchase order follow-up in coordination with the team. Skills that will make you successful You are a natural facilitator who helps ideas turn into real, on-the-ground experiences: - Project-minded and well-organized – You enjoy working in project mode, juggling multiple activations, and coordinating across Creative, Retail, Visual Merchandising, and Marketing teams. - Curious about retail marketing and in-store activations – You’re eager to understand how brand storytelling, consumer experience, and store execution come together in a physical retail environment. - Culturally connected – You have a strong eye for engaging content and a genuine affinity with action sports, street culture, and the Vans DNA (skate, music, art, and self-expression). - Detail-driven yet hands-on – You care about quality, follow through on execution, and take pride in getting the small details right for events and store activations. - Proactive and solution-oriented -You show initiative, adapt quickly, and keep things moving even when plans evolve or challenges arise. - Collaborative by nature – You thrive in team environments, share information openly, and contribute positively to collective success. - Comfortable working with data and tools – You enjoy using tools like Excel and PowerPoint to track projects, support reporting, and tell clear, visual stories. - A Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Marketing, Communication, Business, or a related field is nice to have, but we are most interested in your mindset, curiosity, and relevant experiences. What’s in it for you By joining the Vans Retail Marketing team, you’ll gain real, hands-on experience working on in-store activations and events for an iconic global action sports brand. During your internship, you will: - Work closely with international and cross-functional teams across Retail, Marketing, Creative, and Visual Merchandising. - Contribute to real retail activations and in-store events, from idea to execution. - Learn how brand strategy translates into physical retail experiences that engage consumers. - Receive exposure to retail marketing operations across EMEA, including different store formats. - Benefit from on-the-job learning, mentoring, and collaboration with experienced professionals in the industry. By the end of the internship, you can expect to have a clear understanding of: - How retail marketing and in-store activations are planned, executed, and measured. - How cross-functional teams collaborate to deliver impactful store experiences. - How Vans’ brand values and action-sports culture are expressed at retail level. - The operational side of retail marketing, including asset production, timelines, and budget basics. - What it takes to successfully deliver consumer-facing events in a fast-paced retail environment. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260206-0013

We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260206-0013
descriptionByLocale.it:
Sii un sognatore, fai la differenza! Unisciti al #VFInternshipProgram nella nostra sede centrale EMEA a Stabio, Svizzera, come Intern di Marketing Retail per Vans. Informazioni chiave - Data di inizio: 1 giugno 2026 - Durata: 12 mesi, full-time - Stipendio mensile lordo: 1'850 CHF - Luogo: Sede centrale EMEA di VF a Stabio, Svizzera - Processo di reclutamento snello: 3 colloqui (Recruiter, Responsabile delle Risorse Umane, potenziale caso aziendale) 
• Requisiti di idoneità - Devi essere laureato dopo il 1 maggio 2026 OPPURE devi avere uno status di studente a partire da giugno 2026 - Devi essere cittadino dell'UE o dell'EEA (Area Economica Europea) Parliamo del ruolo! Questo internship offre esperienze pratiche all'incrocio tra marketing e retail, dove aiuterai a plasmare le attivazioni in-store mentre impari come la strategia di marca prende vita al punto di vendita. Supporta la pianificazione e l'esecuzione di iniziative di marketing retail che migliorano la visibilità in-store, l'engagement dei clienti e le prestazioni di vendita. Acquisisci esperienza nell'analizzare i risultati, coordinare con team cross-funzionali e tradurre la strategia di marca in attivazioni retail impattanti. Ecco cosa sarai responsabile di fare come nostro team come Intern di Marketing Retail: - Supporta la pianificazione e l'esecuzione di attivazioni di marketing retail e in-store, aiutando a portare a vita il marchio Vans, la cultura e le storie nei negozi. - Coordina con team cross-funzionali (Retail, Creativo, Visual Merchandising e altre funzioni di Marketing) per raccogliere tutte le tattiche necessarie per consegnare eventi in-store coinvolgenti e attivazioni per i consumatori. - Aiuta con le operazioni di marketing retail in tutta l'EMEA, supportando diversi formati di negozio (Proprietario, Partner, Outlet). - Contribuisci a materiali di formazione e comunicazione per i team di negozio prima delle attivazioni o eventi chiave. - Aiuta a eseguire campagne retail e attivazioni di negozio, inclusi visual in-store, comunicazioni digitali retail e materiali relativi agli eventi. - Fornisci supporto quotidiano per esigenze cross-funzionali, come coordinamento di copie, traduzioni e logistica degli eventi. - Lavora a stretto contatto con i team di Retail DTC (Direct To Consumer) (gestori di distretto e negozio) per supportare una corretta esecuzione a livello di negozio. - Supporta la creazione di brief e recapiti post-attivazione, catturando apprendimenti e best practice per future iniziative in-store. - Supporta il monitoraggio del budget di base e il follow-up degli ordini di acquisto in coordinamento con il team. Abilità che ti faranno avere successo Sei un facilitatore naturale che aiuta le idee a trasformarsi in esperienze reali sul campo: - Progetto-mentale e ben organizzato – Ti piace lavorare in modalità progetto, gestire multiple attivazioni e coordinare attraverso team Creativi, Retail, Visual Merchandising e Marketing. - Curioso di marketing retail e attivazioni in-store – Sei ansioso di capire come la narrazione del marchio, l'esperienza del consumatore e l'esecuzione del negozio si riuniscono in un ambiente retail fisico. - Connesso culturalmente – Hai un occhio forte per contenuti coinvolgenti e un'affinità genuina con gli sport d'azione, la cultura di strada e il DNA di Vans (skate, musica, arte e auto-espressione). - Attento ai dettagli ma pratico – Ti preoccupi della qualità, segui l'esecuzione e ti assumi la responsabilità di ottenere i piccoli dettagli giusti per eventi e attivazioni di negozio. - Proattivo e orientato alle soluzioni - Mostri iniziativa, ti adatti velocemente e mantieni le cose in movimento anche quando i piani evolvono o sorgono sfide. - Collaborativo per natura – Prosperosi in ambienti di team, condividi informazioni apertamente e contribuisci positivamente al successo collettivo. - A tuo agio lavorando con dati e strumenti – Ti piace usare strumenti come Excel e PowerPoint per monitorare progetti, supportare la rendicontazione e raccontare storie chiare e visive. Un Bachelor o Master in Marketing, Comunicazione, Business o un campo correlato è carino da avere, ma siamo più interessati alla tua mentalità, curiosità ed esperienze rilevanti. Cosa c'è per te Unendoti al team di Marketing Retail di Vans, acquisirai esperienza pratica lavorando su attivazioni in-store ed eventi per un'iconica marca globale di sport d'azione. Durante il tuo internship, tu: - Lavorerai a stretto contatto con team internazionali e cross-funzionali attraverso Retail, Marketing, Creativo e Visual Merchandising. - Contribuisci a vere attivazioni retail ed eventi in-store, dall'idea all'esecuzione. - Imparerai come la strategia di marca si traduce in esperienze retail fisiche che coinvolgono i consumatori. - Riceverai esposizione alle operazioni di marketing retail in tutta l'EMEA, inclusi diversi formati di negozio. - Beneficerai di apprendimento sul lavoro, mentoring e collaborazione con professionisti esperti del settore. Alla fine dell'internship, puoi aspettarti di avere una chiara comprensione di: - Come vengono pianificate, eseguite e misurate le attivazioni di marketing retail e in-store. - Come i team cross-funzionali collaborano per consegnare esperienze di negozio impattanti. - Come i valori del marchio Vans e la cultura degli sport d'azione sono espressi a livello retail. - Il lato operativo del marketing retail, inclusa la produzione di asset, tempistiche e nozioni di base sul budget. Il Programma di Internship EMEA di VF è un viaggio di 12 mesi progettato per sviluppare e potenziare i talenti emergenti all'inizio delle loro carriere. Siamo impegnati a liberare il tuo potenziale, quindi puoi aspettarti un percorso di apprendimento strutturato e un'esperienza pratica ricca, inclusa: - Workshop di costruzione delle abilità dedicate e progetto di gruppo di consulenza interna - Un giorno di lavoro in-store ottenendo informazioni reali sui nostri marchi - Opportunità di networking con colleghi e leadership senior. Non possiamo garantire che l'internship ti porterà a un contratto dopo, ma grazie al valore dell'esperienza la maggior parte dei nostri interni rimane nella società dopo il periodo di internship. Poiché vogliamo che ti concentri su ciò che conta, offriamo benefici completi che incoraggiano il benessere mentale, fisico e finanziario. Godrai di: - Politica di lavoro ibrida - 50% di sconto sui marchi VF - Palestra in loco, che offre iniziative di salute e benessere - Mensa sovvenzionata, nonché aree di ritrovo che offrono bevande gratuite - Autobus navetta in ufficio o sconto sui trasporti pubblici, a seconda della tua posizione - Una fiorente comunità di interni, con persone di diversi background, stili di vita e nazionalità che amano lavorare insieme. Libero di Essere, Inclusione e Appartenenza Come datore di lavoro a pari opportunità, ci impegniamo a creare una cultura di appartenenza basata sul rispetto, la connessione, l'apertura e l'autenticità. Siamo impegnati a costruire e mantenere un luogo di lavoro che celebri la diversità dei nostri associati, permettendo loro di portare i loro sé autentici al lavoro ogni giorno. Sei pronto?
descriptionByLocale.de: Sei ein Traumer und mach den Unterschied! Schließe dich dem #VFInternshipProgram in unserem EMEA-Hauptquartier in Stabio, Schweiz, als Retail Marketing Intern für Vans an. Wichtige Informationen - Startdatum: 1. Juni 2026 - Dauer: 12 Monate, Vollzeit - Bruttomonatsgehalt: 1'850 CHF - Standort: VF EMEA-Hauptquartier in Stabio, Schweiz - Straffes Rekrutierungsverfahren: 3 Interviews (Recruiter, Einstellungsmanager, potenzieller Business Case) Eignungsvoraussetzungen - Du musst nach dem 1. Mai 2026 graduieren ODER du musst ab Juni 2026 Student sein - Du musst die Staatsbürgerschaft der EU oder des EEE (Europäischer Wirtschaftsraum) besitzen Lass uns über die Rolle sprechen! Dieses Internship bietet praktische Erfahrungen an der Schnittstelle zwischen Marketing und Retail, wo du helfen wirst, In-Store-Aktivierungen zu gestalten, während du lernst, wie die Markestrategie am Point of Sale zum Leben erweckt wird. Unterstütze die Planung und Ausführung von Retail-Marketing-Initiativen, die die In-Store-Sichtbarkeit, Kundenbindung und Umsatzleistung verbessern. Gewinne Erfahrungen in der Analyse von Ergebnissen, Koordination mit funktionsübergreifenden Teams und Übersetzung von Markestrategien in wirkungsvolle Retail-Aktivierungen. Hier ist, wofür du als unser Team als Retail Marketing Intern verantwortlich bist: - Unterstütze die Planung und Ausführung von Retail-Marketing- und In-Store-Aktivierungen, um die Marke Vans, Kultur und Geschichten zum Leben zu erwecken. - Koordiniere mit funktionsübergreifenden Teams (Retail, Kreativ, Visuelles Merchandising und andere Marketingfunktionen), um alle Taktiken zu sammeln, die benötigt werden, um ansprechende In-Store-Events und Verbraucheraktivierungen zu liefern. - Unterstütze Retail-Marketing-Operationen in ganz EMEA und unterstütze verschiedene Store-Formate (Eigentümer, Partner, Outlet). - Trage zu Schulungs- und Kommunikationsmaterialien für Store-Teams vor wichtigen Aktivierungen oder Events bei. - Hilf bei der Ausführung von Retail-Kampagnen und Store-Aktivierungen, einschließlich In-Store-Visuals, digitaler Retail-Kommunikation und eventbezogener Materialien. - Biete tägliche Unterstützung für funktionsübergreifende Bedürfnisse, wie z.B. Copy-Koordination, Übersetzungen und Event-Logistik. - Arbeite eng mit DTC- (Direct To Consumer) Retail-Teams (Distrikt- und Store-Manager) zusammen, um eine reibungslose Ausführung auf Store-Ebene zu unterstützen. - Unterstütze die Erstellung von Briefs und Post-Activation-Rekapitulativen, um Erkenntnisse und Best Practices für zukünftige In-Store-Initiativen zu erfassen. - Unterstütze die grundlegende Budgetverfolgung und Auftragsverfolgung in Abstimmung mit dem Team. Fähigkeiten, die dich erfolgreich machen Du bist ein natürlicher Facilitator, der Ideen in reale Erfahrungen auf dem Boden umwandelt: - Projektorientiert und gut organisiert – Du genießt es, in Projektmodus zu arbeiten, mehrere Aktivierungen zu jonglieren und über kreative, Retail-, visuelle Merchandising- und Marketingteams zu koordinieren. - Neugierig auf Retail-Marketing und In-Store-Aktivierungen – Du bist begierig, zu verstehen, wie Markengeschichten, Verbrauchererfahrungen und Store-Ausführungen in einer physischen Retail-Umgebung zusammenkommen. - Kulturell verbunden – Du hast ein starkes Auge für ansprechende Inhalte und eine genuine Affinität zu Action-Sports, Street Culture und dem Vans-DNA (Skate, Musik, Kunst und Selbstausdruck). - Detailorientiert, aber praxisorientiert – Du sorgst dich um Qualität, folgst der Ausführung und nimmst dir Zeit, die kleinen Details für Events und Store-Aktivierungen richtig zu machen. - Proaktiv und lösungsorientiert - Du zeigst Initiative, passt dich schnell an und hältst die Dinge am Laufen, auch wenn Pläne evolvieren oder Herausforderungen auftreten. - Kollaborativ von Natur aus – Du gedeihst in Teamumgebungen, teilst Informationen offen und trägst positiv zum kollektiven Erfolg bei. - Wohlbefinden bei der Arbeit mit Daten und Tools – Du genießt es, Tools wie Excel und PowerPoint zu verwenden, um Projekte zu verfolgen, Berichte zu unterstützen und klare, visuelle Geschichten zu erzählen. Ein Bachelor- oder Master-Abschluss in Marketing, Kommunikation, Betriebswirtschaft oder einem verwandten Feld ist schön zu haben, aber wir sind am meisten an deiner Denkweise, Neugier und relevanten Erfahrungen interessiert. Was gibt es für dich, wenn du dich uns anschließt? Als Teil des Vans Retail Marketing Teams gewinnst du echte, praktische Erfahrungen bei der Arbeit an In-Store-Aktivierungen und Events für eine ikonische globale Action-Sports-Marke. Während deines Internships wirst du: - Eng mit internationalen und funktionsübergreifenden Teams über Retail, Marketing, Kreativ und Visuelles Merchandising zusammenarbeiten. - Zu echten Retail-Aktivierungen und In-Store-Events beitragen, von der Idee bis zur Ausführung. - Lernen, wie Markestrategie in physische Retail-Erfahrungen übersetzt wird, die Verbraucher ansprechen. - Einblick in Retail-Marketing-Operationen in ganz EMEA erhalten, einschließlich verschiedener Store-Formate. Am Ende des Internships kannst du erwarten, ein klares Verständnis dafür zu haben: - Wie Retail-Marketing- und In-Store-Aktivierungen geplant, ausgeführt und gemessen werden. - Wie funktionsübergreifende Teams zusammenarbeiten, um wirkungsvolle Store-Erfahrungen zu liefern. - Wie Vans-Markwerte und Action-Sport-Kultur auf Retail-Ebene ausgedrückt werden. - Die operative Seite des Retail-Marketings, einschließlich Asset-Produktion, Zeitpläne und Budgetgrundlagen. Das VF EMEA-Internship-Programm ist eine 12-monatige Reise, die darauf abzielt, aufstrebende Talente zu entwickeln und zu stärken. Wir sind bestrebt, dein Potenzial freizusetzen, sodass du eine strukturierte Lernkurve und eine reiche praktische Erfahrung erwarten kannst, einschließlich: - Dedizierte Workshops zur Kompetenzentwicklung und internes Beratungsgruppenprojekt - Ein Tag Arbeit im Store, um echte Einblicke in unsere Marken zu gewinnen - Networking-Möglichkeiten mit Kollegen und Senior-Führungskräften. Wir können nicht garantieren, dass das Internship zu einem Vertrag führt, aber dank des Wertes der Erfahrung bleiben die meisten unserer Interns nach dem Internship bei uns. Da wir wollen, dass du dich auf das konzentrierst, was zählt, bieten wir umfassende Vorteile, die das geistige, körperliche und finanzielle Wohlbefinden fördern. Du wirst genießen: - Hybride Arbeitsrichtlinie - 50% Rabatt auf VF-Marken - Fitnessstudio vor Ort, das Gesundheits- und Wellnessinitiativen anbietet - Subventionierte Kantine sowie Pausenbereiche, die kostenlose Getränke anbieten - Shuttlebus zum Büro oder Rabatt auf öffentliche Verkehrsmittel, je nach Standort - Eine blühende Internengemeinschaft, mit Menschen aus verschiedenen Hintergründen, Lebensstilen und Nationalitäten, die gerne zusammenarbeiten. Freiheit zu sein, Inklusion und Zugehörigkeit Als Arbeitgeber mit gleichen Chancen bemühen wir uns, eine Kultur der Zugehörigkeit zu schaffen, die auf Respekt, Verbindung, Offenheit und Authentizität basiert. Wir sind bestrebt, einen Arbeitsplatz zu schaffen und aufrechtzuerhalten, der die Vielfalt unserer Mitarbeiter feiert und es ihnen ermöglicht, ihre authentische Selbst zum Arbeitsplatz zu bringen. Bist du bereit? Bewirb dich jetzt – eine frühzeitige Bewerbung erhöht deine Chancen! #readytoapply R-20260206-0013
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Soyez un rêveur et faites la différence ! Rejoignez le #VFInternshipProgram dans notre siège social EMEA à Stabio, Suisse, en tant que stagiaire en Marketing Retail pour Vans. Informations clés - Date de début : 1er juin 2026 - Durée : 12 mois, temps plein - Salaire mensuel brut : 1'850 CHF - Lieu : Siège social EMEA de VF à Stabio, Suisse - Processus de recrutement simplifié : 3 entretiens (Recruteur, Responsable des Ressources Humaines, cas commercial potentiel) 
• Exigences d'éligibilité - Vous devez être diplômé après le 1er mai 2026 OU vous devez avoir un statut d'étudiant à partir de juin 2026 - Vous devez détenir la citoyenneté de l'UE ou de l'EEE (Espace Économique Européen) Parlons du rôle ! Ce stage offre des expériences pratiques à l'intersection du marketing et du retail, où vous aiderez à façonner les activations en magasin tout en apprenant comment la stratégie de marque prend vie au point de vente. Soutenez la planification et l'exécution d'initiatives de marketing retail qui améliorent la visibilité en magasin, l'engagement des clients et les performances de vente. Acquérez de l'expérience dans l'analyse des résultats, la coordination avec les équipes transversales et la traduction de la stratégie de marque en activations retail impactantes. Voici ce que vous serez responsable de faire en rejoignant notre équipe en tant que stagiaire en Marketing Retail : - Soutenez la planification et l'exécution d'activations de marketing retail et en magasin, aidant à faire vivre la marque Vans, la culture et les histoires en magasin. - Coordonez avec les équipes transversales (Retail, Créatif, Merchandising Visuel et autres fonctions de Marketing) pour rassembler toutes les tactiques nécessaires pour livrer des événements en magasin engageants et des activations de consommation. - Aidez aux opérations de marketing retail à travers l'EMEA, en soutenant différents formats de magasins (Propriétaire, Partenaire, Outlet). - Contribuez aux matériaux de formation et de communication pour les équipes de magasin avant les activations ou événements clés. - Aidez à exécuter des campagnes retail et des activations de magasin, y compris des visuels en magasin, des communications numériques retail et des matériaux liés aux événements. - Fournissez un soutien quotidien pour les besoins transversaux, tels que la coordination de copie, les traductions et la logistique événementielle. - Travaillez en étroite collaboration avec les équipes de Retail DTC (Direct To Consumer) (directeurs de district et de magasin) pour soutenir une exécution fluide au niveau du magasin. - Soutenez la création de briefs et de récapitulatifs post-activation, en capturant les apprentissages et les meilleures pratiques pour les initiatives en magasin futures. - Soutenez le suivi budgétaire de base et le suivi des commandes d'achat en coordination avec l'équipe. Compétences qui vous feront réussir Vous êtes un facilitateur naturel qui aide les idées à se transformer en expériences réelles sur le terrain : - Orienté projet et bien organisé – Vous aimez travailler en mode projet, jongler avec plusieurs activations et coordonner à travers les équipes Créatives, Retail, Merchandising Visuel et Marketing. - Curieux de marketing retail et d'activations en magasin – Vous êtes impatient de comprendre comment les histoires de marque, l'expérience consommateur et l'exécution du magasin se réunissent dans un environnement retail physique. - Connecté culturellement – Vous avez un œil fort pour des contenus engageants et une affinité genuine avec les sports d'action, la culture de rue et l'ADN de Vans (skate, musique, art et auto-expression). - Axé sur les détails mais pratique – Vous vous souciez de la qualité, suivez l'exécution et prenez soin des petits détails pour les événements et les activations de magasin. - Proactif et orienté solutions - Vous montrez l'initiative, vous adaptez rapidement et gardez les choses en mouvement même lorsque les plans évoluent ou que des défis surgissent. - Collaboratif par nature – Vous prospérez dans les environnements d'équipe, partagez des informations ouvertement et contribuez positivement au succès collectif. - À l'aise avec le travail avec des données et des outils – Vous aimez utiliser des outils comme Excel et PowerPoint pour suivre les projets, soutenir la déclaration et raconter des histoires claires et visuelles. Un diplôme de Bachelor ou de Master en Marketing, Communication, Commerce ou un domaine connexe est agréable à avoir, mais nous sommes plus intéressés par votre état d'esprit, votre curiosité et vos expériences pertinentes. Qu'est-ce que vous obtiendrez en rejoignant l'équipe ? En rejoignant l'équipe de Marketing Retail de Vans, vous acquerrez des expériences pratiques en travaillant sur des activations en magasin et des événements pour une marque de sport d'action mondiale iconique. Pendant votre stage, vous : - Travaillerez en étroite collaboration avec des équipes internationales et transversales à travers Retail, Marketing, Créatif et Merchandising Visuel. - Contribuerez à de véritables activations retail et événements en magasin, de l'idée à l'exécution. - Apprendrez comment la stratégie de marque se traduit en expériences retail physiques qui engagent les consommateurs. - Recevrez une exposition aux opérations de marketing retail à travers l'EMEA, y compris différents formats de magasins. À la fin du stage, vous pouvez vous attendre à avoir une compréhension claire de : - Comment les activations de marketing retail et en magasin sont planifiées, exécutées et mesurées. - Comment les équipes transversales collaborent pour livrer des expériences de magasin impactantes. - Comment les valeurs de la marque Vans et la culture des sports d'action sont exprimées au niveau retail. - Le côté opérationnel du marketing retail, y compris la production d'actifs, les chronologies et les bases budgétaires. Le programme de stage EMEA de VF est un voyage de 12 mois conçu pour développer et responsabiliser les talents émergents au début de leur carrière. Nous sommes déterminés à libérer votre potentiel, vous pouvez donc vous attendre à un chemin d'apprentissage structuré et à une expérience pratique riche, y compris : - Ateliers de développement de compétences dédiés et projet de groupe de conseil interne - Un jour de travail en magasin pour obtenir des informations réelles sur nos marques - Opportunités de réseautage avec des collègues et des dirigeants seniors. Nous ne pouvons pas garantir que le stage mènera à un contrat par la suite, mais grâce à la valeur de l'expérience, la plupart de nos stagiaires restent dans l'entreprise après la période de stage. Puisque nous voulons que vous vous concentriez sur ce qui compte, nous offrons des avantages complets qui encouragent le bien-être mental, physique et financier. Vous apprécierez : - Politique de travail hybride - 50% de réduction sur les marques VF - Salle de sport sur place offrant des initiatives de santé et de bien-être - Cantine subventionnée, ainsi que des zones de pause offrant des boissons gratuites - Bus de navette pour le bureau ou réduction sur les transports en commun, selon votre emplacement - Une communauté de stagiaires florissante, avec des personnes de divers horizons, modes de vie et nationalités qui aiment travailler ensemble. Liberté d'être, inclusion et appartenance En tant qu'employeur à égalité des chances, nous nous efforçons de créer une culture d'appartenance basée sur le respect, la connexion, l'ouverture et l'authenticité. Nous sommes déterminés à construire et à maintenir un lieu de travail qui célèbre la diversité de nos associés, leur permettant de apporter leur véritable soi au travail chaque jour. Êtes-vous prêt ? Postulez maintenant – une candidature anticipée augmente vos chances ! #readytoapply R-20260206-0013

jobs.title: Product Merchandising Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Product Merchandising Intern for The North Face . About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! As a Product Merchandising Intern you will support the end-to-end product lifecycle by translating market insights into compelling assortments that drive sales and brand growth. Collaborate cross-functionally to ensure the right product is in the right place at the right time, maximizing customer impact and business performance. - Support the SMU (Special Make Up) line planning process by analyzing consumer insights, sales performance, and market trends to inform the FW/SS assortment strategy for Europe. - Coordinate the go-to-market process by managing timelines, tools, and product data accuracy to ensure seamless cross-functional alignment. - Monitor in-season product performance to identify risks and opportunities, providing actionable recommendations to optimize sell-through and margin. - Collaborate with global and regional teams to ensure correct data flows into the systems & assortments reflect brand direction while meeting local market needs and commercial goals. - Contribute to visual line reviews and product presentations by supporting the preparation of compelling tools. - Support data entry of PLM (Product Lifecycle Management) systems, support with transfer from PLM to Flex and update linelists to reflect correct information How you will make a difference To succeed as an Associate Product Merchandising Intern, you should be curious about products, eager to learn how assortments are built, and ready to support a fast-paced team with energy and precision. We are looking for someone who has demonstrated: - The ability to work with numbers and draw simple conclusions to support product decisions. - The capability to stay organized and manage multiple tasks with attention to detail. - A team player. Working x functionally is essential as a assistant product merchandiser. - An understanding of what makes a product appealing to consumers , especially in the European market. - Eye for detail to ensure accuracy across the tools & PLM systems - A basic knowledge of Excel or similar tools to help with data and product tracking. - A keen interest in fashion, retail, or product creation , and a desire to grow in this field. - A positive, can-do attitude , and a willingness to support the team wherever needed. What’s in it For You By joining our team, you will: - Learn how to build and manage a seasonal product line , from concept to market launch. - Gain exposure to real-time business decisions , using data to support product and commercial strategies. - Understand the role of merchandising within a global brand , and how it connects with marketing, sales, and product teams. - Develop your analytical and storytelling skills , turning numbers into product narratives. - Build a strong professional network , with opportunities to connect across teams, functions, and brands. - Receive mentorship and training , helping you grow your confidence and capabilities in a dynamic, international environment. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership In this internship, you’ll gain hands-on experience in how seasonal assortments are built and brought to life across the European market. You’ll work closely with experienced merchandisers, gaining exposure to product strategy, consumer insights, and cross-functional collaboration. We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260209-0020
